zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，上行优势延续
zh.content:
当前价格运行于20日均线上方，最新报1.05894，显示短线多头仍占据主动。24小时小幅上涨且逼近当日高点，整体结构保持偏强，但上涨动能尚未形成明显放量突破，预计仍以震荡上行为主。

从技术指标观察，SMA(20)位于1.044413，对价格形成较强动态支撑，均线呈现助涨作用。MACD维持正值，说明多头动能仍在延续，不过信号线及RSI数据暂缺，需结合后续走势确认趋势持续性。

短线支撑可关注1.04907附近，若回踩企稳，有望继续测试均线支撑并展开反弹；上方首要阻力关注1.06451，高位若有效突破，则有机会进一步打开上涨空间，否则仍可能维持区间整理格局。

交易策略方面，稳健者可等待回踩支撑区域后分批布局，激进者可关注突破阻力后的顺势跟进，同时严格设置止损控制风险。若价格跌破20日均线并持续走弱，应及时降低仓位，避免震荡行情带来的回撤扩大。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is showing a modest bullish tone after advancing 0.94% over the past 24 hours, with the latest price at 1.05894. Trading above the 20-period simple moving average of 1.044413 suggests buyers retain short-term control, although the move remains relatively measured rather than explosive. The session range between 1.04907 and 1.06451 indicates steady participation, with price holding closer to the upper portion of the daily range and maintaining constructive momentum despite limited volatility.

The available technical indicators lean cautiously positive. Price remaining above the SMA(20) reinforces the current upward bias and reflects improving short-term sentiment. The MACD value of 0.0011206936 points to positive momentum, although the absence of a signal line prevents confirmation of a stronger bullish crossover. Likewise, the unavailable RSI(14) means overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed, making price structure and moving-average behavior more important for evaluating the prevailing trend.

From a technical perspective, immediate support appears near the session low around 1.04907, with secondary support aligning close to the SMA(20) at 1.044413. Holding above these levels would help preserve the current positive outlook. On the upside, the recent high at 1.06451 serves as the first resistance. A decisive break above that level could encourage additional buying interest and potentially open the way for a broader continuation of the short-term recovery.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautiously bullish stance while the market remains above the 20-period moving average, particularly if price successfully retests support before moving higher. More conservative participants may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above 1.06451 with sustained volume before entering new long positions. Conversely, a close below 1.044413 would weaken the current technical picture and increase the probability of a deeper pullback, making disciplined risk management and clearly defined stop-loss levels especially important.
